title: Order of disjunctive clauses should not make a difference
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE urlparts (urlid INT PRIMARY KEY, urlname VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM urlparts WHERE urlid IN (218, 219, 329, 3857, 3868);
SELECT * FROM urlparts WHERE urlid IN (3868, 3857, 329, 219, 218);
SELECT urlname FROM urlparts WHERE urlid IN (SELECT urlid FROM urlparts WHERE urlid > 300);
key_bug_features: Order of disjunctive clauses in SQL queries
